creator: wulf@mail.mipt.ru
text:
this port is a drop-in replacement for deprecated and outdated devel/rubygem-ruby-debug-base and devel/rubygem-ruby-debug. It depends on previously submited devel/rubygem-debugger-linecache

debugger is a fast implementation of the standard Ruby debugger debug.rb. It
is implemented by utilizing a new Ruby C API hook. The core component
provides support that front-ends can build on. It provides breakpoint
handling, bindings for stack frames among other things.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
